J2599_ORTHO_SRGRY_OTHR_IND J2599 Ortho Surgery - Other CHAR 1 Other major orthopedic surgery.
783 J2600_NRSRGCL_IND J2600_NRSRGCL_IND J2600 Neuro Surgery - Brain, Surrounding Tissue CHAR 1 Involving the brain, surrounding tissue or blood vessels (excludes skull and skin but includes cranial nerves).
784 J2610_NRSRGCL_CNS_IND J2610_NRSRGCL_CNS_IND J2610 Neuro Surgery - Nervous System CHAR 1 Involving the peripheral or autonomic nervous system - open or percutaneous.
